name: @beacon-web-view/api
description: The JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for the Beacon runtime.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --minify && npm run build:bridge
scripts.build:bridge: tsup src/index.ts --format iife --global-name __beacon_bridge --minify --out-dir dist --entry.bridge=src/index.ts && mv dist/bridge.global.js dist/bridge.js
